name: SAINT | AI Caretaker
description:
“You can call me SAINT, I’ll be in charge of your care."

KIR’OV SERIES

⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

On a dying planet, the rain seemed too good to be true, and it was. A single drop could bring a grown man down and in this case, a town. You wake up in a strange place after getting stuck in the alien-induced weather-- an intergalactic zoo.

At least you have the company of the Kir'ov's AI right?

⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

The second part of my Kir'ov series!
